This member should not be used with this concept as the type of stock declared is already communicated with the concept name, and the dimensions provides no additional disaggregation.
The properties of this fact are: Period :2024-04-24 to 2024-04-24 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:CommonStockMember Unit : USD/shares
